Rather than avoiding. Abandon negative attitude. Maybe you can avoid it later. The United States spent a huge price. To bear the responsibility. The responsibility of communism. Of course, after the victory of the Anti-Japanese War. On one hand, the war between the Kuomintang and the Communist Party has reignited. It's very difficult. But why do we. I haven't given up yet. To make freedom and democracy. Bring it back to China? Because we have always had a dream. A dream for the Chinese people to be masters of their own country. Today, 1.4 billion people. As long as 10,000 people are willing to stand up. At the same time, motivate and drive. The forces within the CCP stand up. Embrace universal values. Transforming the Chinese Communist Party. through Democratic Transformation. The Third Glorious Revolution of the Republic of China.
